title: Pan Aroma 5 x Reed Diffusers - Sandalwood, Caramel, Lemongrass, Lime, Jasmine (Set of 5)
features: Complete set of 5 Reed diffusers per order
No choice to make from all the lovely scents, you will receive every one!
In 5 fragrances: 1 x Honeysuckle & Sandalwood, 1 x Lime & Ginger, 1 x Salted Caramel, 1 x Pure Jasmine, 1 x Lemongrass
description: Product description Complete set of 5 Reed diffusers per order No choice to make from all the lovely scents, you will receive every one! In 5 fragrances: 1 x Honeysuckle & Sandalwood, 1 x Lime & Ginger, 1 x Salted Caramel, 1 x Pure Jasmine, 1 x Lemongrass 5 reed diffusers with 4 sticks each 50ml each Excellent Value Directions Flip the reeds to refresh the scent. Replace the reeds when the scent is no longer strong. No assembly or mode selection required. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
